name: Gaitan Plastering
tagline: Santa Rosa's plastering and stucco specialists since 1978
seoDescription: Gaitan Plastering in Santa Rosa, CA — stucco, interior and exterior plaster, lath, and architectural foam shapes. Family-run craftsmanship since 1978.

sections.heading: Stucco and plaster done right, the first time
sections.subheading: A Santa Rosa family trade since 1978 — exterior stucco, interior plaster, lath, and architectural foam detailing for homes and commercial buildings across Sonoma County.

sections.heading: About Gaitan Plastering
body: Owner Joe Gaitan has worked in the plastering trade since 1978, and Gaitan Plastering has built its reputation on Santa Rosa Avenue as a go-to source for high-quality stucco and plaster work across Northern California.

The company handles both residential and commercial projects, from full exterior stucco systems and interior plaster to lath and custom architectural foam detailing — decorative columns, foam sills, window and door trim, and other precut shapes that give a building its character. It's a fully licensed, BBB-accredited business with an A+ rating.

items.title: Exterior Stucco
items.description: Complete stucco systems for new builds and remodels — scratch, brown, and color/finish coats applied for a durable, weather-tight exterior.

items.title: Interior Plastering
items.description: Smooth and textured interior plaster for residential and commercial walls and ceilings, finished to match the look you want.

items.title: Lath & Base Coats
items.description: Proper lath and base-coat preparation that gives stucco and plaster a sound, long-lasting foundation.

items.title: Architectural Foam Shapes
items.description: Custom EPS foam detailing — decorative columns, foam sills, chimney caps, posts, and precut window and door trim to add architectural character.

items.title: Plaster & Stucco Repair
items.description: Patching and repair of cracked, damaged, or aging stucco and plaster, blended to match existing wall finishes.

items.title: Commercial Plastering
items.description: Plaster and stucco work for commercial buildings, handled by an experienced licensed crew.

items.quote: Gaitan Plastering produces some of the highest quality work in Northern California. His company is one of a handful of plastering contractors that I highly recommend.
items.author: Industry colleague

sections.heading: Work with Gaitan Plastering
sections.body: Find us at 3237 Santa Rosa Ave. Call (707) 566-9118 — we’re glad to help.
